summary: Completed testing of pagination and force state change features. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified Modelos pagination (50 de 1161), Registros pagination (50 de 174), filter dropdowns, search functionality, and the 'Forzar Cambio' dialog for blocked state changes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pagination and force state change features are fully functional. Backend tests cover: GET /api/modelos with pagination (limit/offset/search/marca filters), GET /api/modelos?all=true returns array, GET /api/modelos-filtros returns filter options, GET /api/registros with pagination, POST /api/registros/{id}/validar-cambio-estado with forzar option. Frontend verified: Modelos page shows '50 de 1161' with 'Cargar mas' button, filter dropdowns (marca/tipo/entalle/tela), search input. Registros page shows '50 de 174 registros' with pagination. RegistroForm has Modelo combobox with search, estado selector with visual progress bar, and 'Forzar Cambio' dialog appears when trying to change to a blocked state.

backend_validar_cambio_estado_forzar.details: POST with forzar=true returns permitido=true even when blocked

frontend_modelos_pagination.details: Shows '50 de 1161' with 'Cargar mas (50 de 1161)' button

frontend_modelos_filters.details: Filter dropdowns present: marca, tipo, entalle, tela

frontend_registros_pagination.details: Shows '50 de 174 registros' with 'Cargar más' button

frontend_registro_form_modelo_combobox.details: Combobox with search functionality, shows modelo options

frontend_forzar_cambio_dialog.details: Dialog appears when clicking blocked estado, shows bloqueos list with 'Cancelar' and 'Forzar Cambio' buttons
